title: pyrus cydonia oblonga
intro: Pyrus cydonia oblonga, commonly known as the quince, is a deciduous shrub or small tree in the family Rosaceae. The quince has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of quince include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and promote wound healing. Quince can be prepared into herbal teas, jams, and infusions, or used as a powder in capsules, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
